Google Domains Shut Down — Buying a Domain on Cloudflare and Deploying a Site, Step by Step

I wrote a domain-buying tutorial way back, using Google Domain as the example. But Google Domain announced shutdown on September 7, 2023, so here's the Cloudflare Domain version — registering a domain, deploying a static site with Pages, and migrating an existing Squarespace (post-Google-Domain) domain over.
